name: source_file_path
description: Source file Stryker mutates, relative to repo root, e.g. packages/workflow/src/cron.ts. Primary key — one row per source file.

name: package
description: pnpm workspace package name, e.g. n8n-workflow.

name: last_score
description: Most recent mutation score as a percentage 0-100. NULL for status=new rows. Measures how well the test suite catches bugs in this source — not how much of it is executed.

name: threshold_at_run
description: The mutation-score threshold in effect at the time of the most recent run. Recorded so historical green/red verdicts remain interpretable as the threshold evolves.

name: last_checked_at
description: When the most recent Stryker run completed. NULL for status=new rows. Drives the age-based 'stale' computation in the picker.

name: status
description: Stored state: new | green | red. The picker computes an effective 'stale' state at runtime from last_checked_at age (no separate column needed).

name: mutants_killed
description: Mutants killed in the most recent run.

name: mutants_survived
description: Mutants that survived the most recent run. The interesting denominator for AI loop feedback.

name: mutants_no_coverage
description: Mutants not covered by any test in the most recent run.

name: mutants_timeout
description: Mutants that timed out (counted as detected for scoring purposes).
